title: Smuggler's Blues

"'''Smuggler's Blues'''" was a comic appearing in ''[[Star Wars Tales 14]]'' and collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]''.

==Plot summary==
This story is set shortly before [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] enter the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley cantina]].

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] are sitting at a table in the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]]. Han is complaining that business has been slow since he dumped a shipment of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]]. Chewbacca tells Han he has some clients who want to hire the duo, so they impatiently interview them all.

The first client is a [[Snivvian/Legends|Snivvian]] who may or may not be [[Zutton/Legends|Zutton]]. The Snivvian wants to transport some "Hutt-smut" to the [[Kurluvion system/Legends|Kurluvion system]]. Han tells the wily Snivvian that he'd rather "be frozen in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] and hung up on a wall, than smuggle that trash."

The next candidate is a blue-skinned [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who is hoping that Han has a job opening for her. She offers to be a stewardess and hand out peanuts or clean up the ship, but Han tells her that "we're not that kind of operation, sister—sorry we can't help you." The Twi'lek walks away sadly, saying, "I guess I'll just have to take that job at [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] after all."

Next is a sect of aliens led by Brother [[Xando]]. They request passage to the "holy planet" of [[Norclune]]. Han tells them that it is "quite a trip" and "it'll cost ya." But Xando tells him that they have no possessions and that they prayed Han would "bestow the trip as a gift to the living [[The Force/Legends|Force]]." Han tells them (ironically) that "the day I believe in the 'Force' is the day I join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]."

[[File:Small_version.jpg|250px|thumb|Dr. [[Cornelius Evazan/Legends|Cornelius Evazan]] and [[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]] threaten [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]].]]

Next is Dr. [[Cornelius Evazan/Legends|Cornelius Evazan]] and [[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]] (Hyuck). The doctor and his comrade demand passage off [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] "right away" with a discount as well. Evazan tells Han that "I have the death sentence of twelve systems—one more won't matter!" Chewbacca shows them on their way.

As Dr. Evazan walks off grumbling, Han tells Chewbacca to find someone "worthwhile," by which he means "no freaks, no perverts, no charity cases," and that an "old man with connections, or a kid with a speeder he can sell for a one-way ticket outta here" would be ideal.

Han reflects on his "smuggler's blues" by suggesting that "being thrown into a [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] pit would be less painful." As he reflects, [[Wuher/Legends|Wuher]] yells, "No blasters, no blasters," and Han complains quietly that "Chewbacca will probably bring whoever's causing that trouble over there next."
